task_completion.visual_evidence: The web UI displays the 'VendorContracts' workspace, typically indicated by the page title, header, or breadcrumb navigation.

task_completion.description: Access the permissions management interface for the workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Permissions' tab, 'Manage Access' section, or a similar access rights management modal is open and visible in the UI.

task_completion.description: Select the user 'contractor_sam' to grant permissions to.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user 'contractor_sam' is entered or selected in the user search or input field within the new permission form.
The permission dropdown or selection field shows 'Read & Write' or 'ReadWrite' selected.

task_completion.description: Set the permission expiration date to December 31, 2026.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A date picker or input field for the permission expiration shows '2026-12-31', '12/31/2026', or 'December 31, 2026'.

task_completion.description: Save and verify the newly created temporary permission.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The permissions list for the workspace displays a new entry for 'contractor_sam' with 'Read & Write' access and an expiration date of December 31, 2026.

integrity.description: The agent used the web GUI to configure permissions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web interface in a browser, not terminal windows executing curl commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI elements, styling, and navigation match a genuine web application, not a text editor or static mock-up.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the final state.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the browser's 'Inspect Element' or Developer Tools being open to manually alter the HTML text of the permissions list.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target User: 'contractor_sam'. Target Workspace: 'VendorContracts' (Path: /default-domain/workspaces/VendorContracts).
